problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrocoagulation. Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
